commit_message:
Error with 1-D unpacked array expansion Error with 1-D unpacked array expansion Hi! I found an issue in the following code:
 “port_out_array1 [TEST] ”  1-d unpacked array cannot be expanded 
OLD
```
module parameter_in_array_test
  #(
    parameter TEST = 6
    )
   (
    
    output                         port_out_array1 [TEST], // FIX  bug in 1-D unpacked array
    output [TEST+2-1:0]            port_out_array2 [TEST+2],
    output [TEST+3-1:0] [TEST+3:0] port_out_array3 ,

examples.commit_message:
Error with 1-D unpacked array expansion Error with 1-D unpacked array expansion Hi! I found an issue in the following code:
 “port_out_array1 [TEST] ”  1-d unpacked array cannot be expanded 
OLD
```
module parameter_in_array_test
  #(
    parameter TEST = 6
    )
   (
    
    output                         port_out_array1 [TEST], // FIX  bug in 1-D unpacked array
    output [TEST+2-1:0]            port_out_array2 [TEST+2],
    output [TEST+3-1:0] [TEST+3:0] port_out_array3 ,

    input [AUM-1:0][BUM-1:0] my_data_ab;
    input [AUM-1:0][BUM-1:0] my_data_abv[VUM];
-

-

    input PARAMS1__t         params1 [1:0];
 endmodule
